description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsGreen top that has a deep round neck, lace detail on top of the shoulders and along the length of the top, short sleeves, elasticated and smocked at the hem with an inner spaghetti strap top stitched to the top at the shoulders that is longer than the topMaterial and Care65% polyester and 35% viscoseMachine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegularThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
